name: convergence
description: UI-first desktop app for managing agent work across local codebases

scripts.dev: npm run prepare:release-notes && electron-rebuild --force -o better-sqlite3,node-pty && electron-vite dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare:release-notes && electron-rebuild --force -o better-sqlite3,node-pty && electron-vite build
scripts.build:preview: npm run prepare:release-notes && electron-vite build && electron-vite preview
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.package:mac:dir:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir --publish never
scripts.test: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 node-pty > /dev/null 2>&1; vitest run
scripts.test:pure: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 node-pty > /dev/null 2>&1; vitest run --config vitest.pure.config.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 node-pty > /dev/null 2>&1; vitest run --config vitest.unit.config.ts
